attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY. OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT     AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD  AS OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NSLSRMT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,   
 -9999  AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
 NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   AS  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY    AS  MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY. DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS  OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM   AS   OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NSLSRMT.DIRECT_SALES_REP_NUMBER   AS DIRECT_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NSLSRMT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS  END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY   AS  PRODUCT_KEY,
 NSLSRMT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS DIRECT_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  AS   DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT  AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_EXTENDED_QTY AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS  BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CODE,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT       AS  OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT as OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT ,
 NSLSRMT.SERVICE_FLG   AS  SERVICE_FLG,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG   AS  FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_LATEST_SC_FLG   AS  LATEST_RECORD_FLG,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 NSLSRMT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,    
 NSLSRMT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NSLSRMT.DV_FMV_FLG  AS DV_FMV_FLG,
 NSLSRMT.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 NSLSRMT.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 NSLSRMT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   AS  DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 '=' DSV_FLG,
 RMT.REPORTED_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUM AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 'UNKNOWN'  as DV_DEAL_ID,
 NSLSRMT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD  AS  PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 '=' as CANCEL_CD,                     
 NSLSRMT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS DV_BOOKED_DT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 MT_OVERLAY.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY , /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ 
 /* below RD attributes added as part of Sep FY17 CDR */  
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  ELSE MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END RD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)* -1 ELSE NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END RD_DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS RD_DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN  NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY END RD_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END RD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS RD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN NSLSRMT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NSLSRMT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
/*Added below columns as part of April 9th Recurring Offer*/
  COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N') as XCAT_FLG,
  COALESCE(MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') as BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, 
 COALESCE(MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') as RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
  (CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NP.XCAT_FLG ELSE COALESCE(MT.ELA_FLG,'N') END) as ELA_FLG,
   /*Added as part of Q4FY17 April release*/
 RMT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 CAST (TRIM(COALESCE(NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || TRIM(COALESCE(NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || -9999 ||  '~' || TRIM(COALESCE(NSLSRMT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) 
 AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
 -999 AS SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY , /* Added as part of Sales FY18June14Rel */
 'UNKNOWN' AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
 'N' AS ACQUISITION_ROLE
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE MT_OVERLAY
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DIRECT_DATA_MNL_O_INCR NSLSRMT    
 ON NSLSRMT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = MT_OVERLAY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND  MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'O_ADJ'
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJ_REBOK_MNL_TRX  RMT 
 ON  MT_OVERLAY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY = RMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = RFMTY.CALENDAR_DATE
/*Added below condtions as part of April 9th Recurring Offer*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP MT
 ON MT.PRODUCT_KEY = NSLSRMT.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND MT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = NSLSRMT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND MT.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = NSLSRMT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 WHERE MT_OVERLAY.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE'
 AND TABLE_NAME ='MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_O_ADJ')
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE   RD 
     WHERE MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = RD.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
     AND RD.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ='O_ADJ' )

SELECT
 MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT  AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT,
 MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD  AS OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,  
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   AS  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY    AS  MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS  DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM   AS   DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM,
 NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER   AS DIRECT_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS  END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.PRODUCT_KEY   AS  PRODUCT_KEY,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS DIRECT_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  AS   DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT  AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DD_EXTENDED_QTY AS  DD_EXTENDED_QTY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS  BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT  AS  DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,
 NBM.SERVICE_FLG   AS  SERVICE_FLG,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG   AS  DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_LATEST_SC_FLG   AS  DV_LATEST_SC_FLG,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,    
 NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NBM.DV_FMV_FLG  AS DV_FMV_FLG,
 NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   AS  DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 NBM.DSV_FLG AS  DSV_FLG,
 NBMO.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT  AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 NBMO.DV_DEAL_ID as DV_DEAL_ID,
 NBM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY    as SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD  AS  PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
 NBM.CANCEL_CODE as CANCEL_CD,                     
 NBMO.DV_BOOKED_DT,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 MT_OVERLAY.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY , /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ 
 /* below RD attributes added as part of Sep FY17 CDR */  
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  ELSE MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END RD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)* -1 ELSE NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END RD_DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS RD_DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
 CASE WHEN NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN NBM.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN  NBM.PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.PRODUCT_KEY END RD_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END RD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END RD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  /*Added as part of Q4FY17-Offer Attribution*/ 
 NBM.XCAT_FLG,
 NBM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 NBM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 NBM.ELA_FLG,
  /*Added as part of Q4FY17 April release*/
 NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 NBM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD ,
NBMO.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of ACV SCALE FY21 Rel */
/* Added as part of ACV Overlay changes */
,NBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,NBM.DV_INV_DTM
,MT_OVERLAY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,NBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,NBM.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE
,NBM.SALES_MOTION_CD
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,NBM.CONVERSION_RT
,NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD
,MT_OVERLAY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,NBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
,MT_OVERLAY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME
,NBM.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
FROM
  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE   MT_OVERLAY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
 ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = MT_OVERLAY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = MT_OVERLAY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBMO
 ON NBMO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NBMO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND NBMO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = RFMTY.CALENDAR_DATE
 WHERE  MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'SLS_ADJ','POS_ADJ')
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ( 'SLS_ADJ','POS_ADJ')
 AND NBMO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ( 'SLS_ADJ','POS_ADJ')
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE   RD 
     WHERE MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = RD.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
     AND RD.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE   IN ( 'SLS_ADJ','POS_ADJ') )
 AND MT_OVERLAY.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE'
 AND TABLE_NAME ='MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_L_ADJ')

SELECT
 MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT     AS OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD    AS OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  AS  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,  
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT as DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   AS  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 MT_OVERLAY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY    AS  MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS  OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NBM.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,

 MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT,

 NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  AS  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,    
 /*NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,*/

 	WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX','MS','CCR','WWP')

 ELSE NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 END SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,

 NBM.CANCEL_CODE as CANCEL_CD,

 MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 MT_OVERLAY.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY , /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ 
 /* below RD attributes added as part of Sep FY17 CDR */  
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IN( -9999 , -999) THEN  RANDOM(1000000,1003000)*-1  ELSE MT_OVERLAY.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT END RD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011801)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END RD_DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)* -1 ELSE NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END RD_DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END AS RD_DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,  
 CASE WHEN NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE MT_OVERLAY.DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END RD_DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
 CASE WHEN NBM.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN  NBM.PRODUCT_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.PRODUCT_KEY END RD_PRODUCT_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END RD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY= -9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -7777 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = -6666 THEN RANDOM(1015000,1016800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END RD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END RD_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,

 NBM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 NBM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,

  NBM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
CASE 
	WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX') THEN RANDOM(3000000,3001500)*-1 
ELSE NBMO.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY  END SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of ACV SCALE FY21 Rel */

,NBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,NBM.DV_INV_DTM
,MT_OVERLAY.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,NBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,NBM.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE
,CASE WHEN MT_OVERLAY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX') THEN 'RENEW'
ELSE NBM.SALES_MOTION_CD END SALES_MOTION_CD
,NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
,NBM.CONVERSION_RT
,NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD
,MT_OVERLAY.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,NBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
,MT_OVERLAY.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME
,NBM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,NBM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 --ADDED AS PART OF FY22 OVERLAY
,'UNKNOWN' AS RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE /*Q4FY22 Overlay changes DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE column addition*/
,NBM.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
 FROM
  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE   MT_OVERLAY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
 ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = MT_OVERLAY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = MT_OVERLAY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBMO
 ON NBMO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NBMO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND NBMO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  --ADDED AS PART OF FY22 OVERLAY
 AND NBM.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
AND MT_OVERLAY.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = RFMTY.CALENDAR_DATE
 WHERE  MT_OVERLAY.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR'
 AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='AR'
 AND NBMO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='AR'
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE   RD 
     WHERE MT_OVERLAY.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = RD.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
     AND RD.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ='AR' ) 
 AND MT_OVERLAY.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE'
 AND TABLE_NAME ='MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE_AR')
